title: The Iron Coast
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A disgraced naval officer turned pirate must unite the warring captains of the Iron Coast against an armada.
long_description: Captain Rourke was a lieutenant in the Royal Navy until he refused an order to burn a surrendered sloop. Stripped of rank and sentenced to hang, he escapes with the help of Isabel Ventura, a shipwright whose father was murdered by the same admiral who condemned Rourke. Together, they must unite the warring pirate captains of the Iron Coast into a single fleet — before Admiral Graves and his twenty-three ships of the line erase the coast from history. A swashbuckling historical adventure about freedom, loyalty, and the price of building a republic from the decks of stolen ships.
